---
title: "Getting Started with neuromesh"
author: "Tim Schaefer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with neuromesh}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Overview

**neuromesh** is a neuroimaging layer on top of the scimesh software
renderer. It provides FreeSurfer-aware functions for 3D brain surface
visualisation.

```r
library(neuromesh)
library(scimesh)

img <- vis.subject.morph.native(
    subjects_dir = "~/data/study1",
    subject_id  = "subject1",
    measure     = "sulc",
    views       = "t4",
    cortex_only = TRUE,
    draw_colorbar = TRUE,
    colorbar_title = "Sulcal depth [mm]"
)

scimesh::write_png(img, "brain_sulc_t4.png")
```
